outlook_paragraph: SM shows no active drilling sites at the decision date, with zero newly or continuously active pads according to satellite SAR data, suggesting stagnant near-term production growth into Q1 2021. Despite elevated WTI prices averaging $91.33/bbl and a realized price discount of 12%, revenue remains constrained by limited operational activity. With only 55% exposure to the active segment, the deterministic revenue forecast is anchored at $340.08M, reflecting minimal drilling momentum and reliance on legacy production.
